parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT e.user_id FROM research.voc_entries e WHERE e.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '90 days';

SELECT e.id, e.user_id, e.dimension, e.text, e.source_url, e.source_platform, e.persona, e.funnel_stage, e.frequency, e.trend, e.first_seen, e.last_seen FROM research.voc_entries e WHERE e.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND e.first_seen >= now() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY e.first_seen DESC;
UPDATE research.voc_entries SET frequency = {{ $json.frequency }}, trend = '{{ $json.trend }}', last_seen = '{{ $json.last_seen }}'::timestamptz WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid;
